hero.title: InfoTech Innovation
hero.subtitle: Algeria's digital hub for youth, educators, and institutions, where community ideas become real solutions.

about.title: About InfoTech Innovation
about.description: InfoTech Innovation is an Algerian initiative that bridges the gap between young talent and the digital world. We offer structured programs in coding, digital design, and technology, equipping the next generation with real skills to solve real problems.

join.title: Join the Community
join.description: Register as a youth, teacher, or institution and become part of a growing network of changemakers.

issues.title: Submit an Issue
issues.description: Identify and share community problems so we can tackle them together with the right people.

ideas.title: Share an Idea
ideas.description: Have a solution in mind? Share your idea and let the community help turn it into reality.

surveys.title: Participate in Surveys
surveys.description: Answer surveys that help us understand the needs of our community better.

activities.title: Explore Activities
activities.description: Browse photos, videos, and reports from our past events and workshops.

chatbot.title: Digital Assistant
chatbot.description: Our intelligent chatbot guides you through the platform and helps you find what you need.

founder.label: Behind This Project
founder.name: Hayet Laimouche
founder.tagline: Driving InfoTech Innovation's mission to bring generative AI and modern education to communities across Algeria.
founder.credentials: Generative AI Expert · Education Management (Microsoft Certified)

location.label: Find Us
location.title: Our Location
location.subtitle: Come visit InfoTech Innovation in Merad, Algeria. We'd love to meet you.

join.title: Join Us
join.subtitle: Choose your profile and fill in your details. We will get back to you shortly.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.contribution: How would you like to contribute?
fields.description: Why are you looking to contact us?
fields.description_placeholder: Tell us about your institution and how you'd like to collaborate...

underage.title: Parental Consent Required
underage.description: Since you are under 17, a signed parental consent form is required. Download the form below, fill it out, and upload the signed copy.

adult_form.title: Registration Form Required
adult_form.description: Please download the registration form, fill it out, and upload the signed copy before submitting.

join.success_message: Thank you for joining us. We will be in touch with you soon.
join.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
join.duplicate_email: This email is already registered. Please use a different email address.

issues.title: Issues & Ideas
issues.subtitle: Share a community problem or propose an idea. Every voice matters.

fields.title: Issue Title
fields.title_placeholder: Summarize the problem in one line
fields.description_placeholder: Explain the problem in detail. What is happening? Where? How does it affect the community?
fields.solution_placeholder: Do you have a suggestion to solve this problem? Share it here.

issues.success_message: Your issue has been submitted. Our team will review it and follow up.
issues.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.subtitle: Your opinion matters. Help us understand your community better.
surveys.empty_message: Check back soon. New surveys will be published regularly.
surveys.success_message: Your answers have been recorded successfully.
surveys.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
